titleStmt.title: SII 38.211: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 211. (A.R. No. 211 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachakravartin Rājarāja (III) Year: 19: 43 day. Simha. Su. di. 1235 A.D.

summary.p: Records an order of the god agreeing to the separation and constitution of a separate unit of sixty-vēli of land situated to the south of Maṇali alias Siṁhavishṇuchaturvēdimaṅgalam and naming it as Uṟavākkiṉanallūr as requested by Karuppuḻān Tiruvēgamuḍaiyān perumāḷ, a kāṇi holder of Vēḻshāṟu, a dēvadāna village. This is done in honour of Uravākkina talaikkōli, a dancing-girl (padiyilār) who sang agamārgam before the god when he was pleased to be present in the Rājarājan tirumaṇḍapa on the occasion of the eighth day of Āvaṇi-tirunāḷ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 9vatu siṁThe viśarga ‘o’ is engraved below the line. hanāyaṟṟup pūrvapakṣattu perumāḷ tiruvāvaṇaRead tiruvāvaṇitt tirunāḷ Eṭṭāṉtirunāḷ Iravu rājarājaṉtiru
maṇṭapattile Eḻuntaruḷiiruntu patiyilāril Uṟavākkinat talaikkoliyai Akamāṟkaṅkaṇṭaruḷāṉiṟkattāṉattukku veṇṭuvār Eḻuntiruntu teṇṭaṉpaṇṇittevarika
ḷ tirumaṭaippaḷḷippuṟaṅkaḷāṉa Ūrkaḷil veḻṣāṟṟil kāṇi Uṭaiya karuppuḻān tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉ karumāṇikkam perumāḷ maṇaliyāṉa siṁhaviṣṇaccaturvedimaṅka
lattut teṟkaṭaiyak kaṇṭañcerviḷai nilamuṅ kollai nilamum nattamum Uṭpaṭa Ivvūr sabhaiyār pakkal koṇṭu Uṭaiya nilam Aṟupatiṟṟuveliyum Uṟavākkiṉanallūr
Eṉṉum perāl cilālekaip paṇṇappeṟa veṇumeṉṟu viṇṇappañceyat tiruvuḷḷamāyt tāṉattāraiyuṅ koyil kaṇakkut tiruvoṟṟiūruṭaiyāṉaiyum
Ippaṭikku nam variyilum Iṭṭuccilālekai paṇṇuvippateṉṟu tiruvuḷḷamāy Aruḷuki nila veḻṣāṟṟuk karuppuḻāṉ tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉ karumāṇikkam
(pa) perumāḷ maṇaliyāṉa siṁhaviṣṇaccaturvedimaṅkalattuk koṇṭu Uṭaiya nilam Aṟupatiṟṟu veliyum pattonpatāvatu nāḷ nāṟpattu
muṉṟumutal veṟupiṟittu Uṟavākkiṉanallūr Eṉṉum perāl cilālekai paṇṇittu .
Digital edition of SII 38.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
